The Method

Seven tasks. No more.

The 3-3-3 structure keeps your day focused without overwhelming you.

3

Hours of deep work

One meaningful project. Fully focused. Protected time for your most important work.

3
3

Shorter tasks

Urgent to-dos or things you've been avoiding. Dealt with efficiently and cleared.

3
3

Maintenance tasks

The obligations that keep life running — admin, routines, errands. Acknowledged and handled.

3

Plan your day in minutes

Open the app each morning and set your seven tasks. The structure does the thinking — you just fill in what matters today.

Swipe left to delete, swipe right to complete. Tasks carry forward if you don't finish them.

Swipe to complete Carry forward Inline editing

Deep work. Undistracted.

Start a 3-hour Focus session and the app locks you in. Full-screen minimal timer, no distractions, just you and your work.

The screen stays on. The clock counts. You finish what you started.

3-hour timer Focus Mode Screen stays on

Build a streak worth keeping

Every completed day builds your streak, earns XP, and unlocks badges. The gamification is subtle but effective.

The weekly review shows you exactly how consistent you've been — and the insight line tells you honestly.

Streak tracking XP & levels Weekly review

End each day with intention

When your 3-3-3 is complete, a celebration fires — then a summary shows your deep work time, all seven tasks, and prompts a one-line reflection.

Your history builds over time so you can see the patterns in how you work best.

Day summary Reflection prompt Share your streak
